response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack/web software craftsman with deep TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang experience, but the role requires SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, and deep-learning workload analysis — none of which appear in the resume. No GPU architecture, SIMD/MIMD, hardware-software co-design, or DNN training/inference optimization background is evident. The educational path (BS + ~14 years experience) meets the minimum threshold, but the experience is in the wrong domain entirely.
strengths: Long track record (14+ years) of professional software development across multiple stacks
Some low-level/systems exposure via C/C++ at National Instruments and high-performance DLang microservices at Sociomantic
Strong engineering discipline: TDD, CI/CD, performance-sensitive backend work
concerns: No SoC, IP modeling, or hardware architecture experience whatsoever
No AI accelerator, GPU architecture, SIMD/MIMD, or deep-learning workload optimization background
Career trajectory is web/full-stack/GIS, not hardware-software co-design at a principal IC level

key_factors.factor: No AI accelerator / SoC modeling experience
Meets minimum BS + 8 years education/experience threshold
